tips: Device Rescue can organize selected-file recovery when authorized access is already available.
Bootloader unlocking commonly wipes user data and is not a recovery method.
Official addons remain inactive until explicitly installed and enabled.
Script Studio assets remain unloaded until explicitly reviewed and loaded.
SUS Companion keeps assessment data local and includes no automatic upload.
Runtime observations can be converted into structured findings after operator review.
The Add-ons Center separates installation, trust, permissions, enablement, loading, and opening.
A matching device serial is required for device-bound workflows.
Evidence is registered only after an explicit operator action.
WebView static matches are candidates, not automatically confirmed vulnerabilities.
